title: WS-Federation Service Provider Partner Configuration
description: Configuration for a WS-Federation Service Provider partner within an Identity Provider federation.

template_name.description: An identifier for the template on which to base this partner.

endpoint.description: The endpoint of the WS-Federation partner.

key_alias.description: The keystore and certificate to use to validate the signature. Only required if verify_signatures is set to true and use_key_info is set to false.

key_info.description: The regular expression used to find the X509 certificate for signature validation. Only required if verify_signatures is set to true and use_key_info is set to true.

max_request_lifetime.description: The amount of time that the request is valid (in milliseconds).

realm.description: The realm of the WS-Federation partner.

use_key_info.description: Whether to use the keyInfo of the XML signature to find the X509 certificate for signature validation (true) or the specified key_alias (false). Only required if verify_signatures is set to true.

verify_signatures.description: Whether to enable signature validation. Defaults to false if not specified.

want_multiple_attribute_statements.description: Whether to create multiple attribute statements in the Universal User.
